name: beardrive
description: BearDrive (beardrive) — a synced file system for AI agents

plugins.name: beardrive
plugins.description: BearDrive: folders that stay in sync across your team and agents through a BearDrive server (or S3/GCS directly). Installs the beardrive skill, /beardrive:install, /beardrive:init and /beardrive:status commands, and turn-boundary sync hooks in one step.
